channel.title: Dang Tho Bach's Knowledge Base
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Dang Tho Bach's Knowledge Base

item.title: 25-vDOM-vs-SolidJS-Reactivity
item.description: React Virtual DOM vs SolidJS Fine-grained Reactivity tags: react solidjs virtual-dom performance reconciler fiber Bài so sánh chi tiết: SolidJS-vs-React-Reactivity-Model Tóm tắt nhanh React dùng Virtual DOM — mỗi setState trigger re-run component function, build new vDOM tree, diff (reconcile), rồi ...

item.title: SolidJS-15-Reactivity-vs-React-vDOM
item.description: SolidJS Reactivity vs React Virtual DOM — Performance Deep Dive tags: solidjs react reactivity performance virtual-dom Bài so sánh chi tiết: SolidJS-vs-React-Reactivity-Model Tóm tắt nhanh SolidJS không re-run component function khi state thay đổi.

item.title: React-Compiler-Internals-Memoization
item.description: React Compiler — Cơ chế thu hẹp gap với SolidJS tags: react react-compiler memoization performance compiler HIR SSA internals 1.

item.title: SolidJS-vs-React-Reactivity-Model
item.description: SolidJS vs React — Fine-grained Reactivity vs Virtual DOM tags: solidjs react reactivity virtual-dom signals performance internals 1.

item.title: 24-Two-Way-Binding-Internals
item.description: Angular Two-Way Data Binding — Cơ chế bên dưới tags: angular data-binding zone-js change-detection signals internals 1.

item.title: 22-Routing-Layout-SearchState
item.description: Angular Routing — Layout Cố Định & Search State Preservation tags: angular routing layout search-state frontend 1.

item.title: 23-Multiple-Router-Outlets-Named-Auxiliary
item.description: Multiple Router Outlets trong SPA — Named & Auxiliary Routes tags: angular react solidjs routing named-outlet auxiliary-route 1.

item.title: 23-Routing-Layout-SearchState
item.description: React Routing — Layout Cố Định & Search State Preservation tags: react react-router routing layout search-state frontend 1.

item.title: 24-Multiple-Router-Outlets-Pattern
item.description: Multiple Router Outlets trong React — Parallel Rendering Pattern tags: react react-router routing parallel-routes named-outlet Bài này cover phần React của chủ đề Multiple Router Outlets.

item.title: SolidJS-13-Routing-Layout-SearchState
item.description: SolidJS Routing — Layout Cố Định & Search State Preservation tags: solidjs solid-router routing layout search-state frontend 1.
